DEGRADED.reason: authorized responder may access critical services during degraded operation
unknown nodes cannot access critical services during degraded operation
civilian users cannot access responder critical services during degraded operation
sensor nodes cannot access responder critical services during degraded operation
external data network access is restricted during degraded operation
default deny for critical services unless an explicit local identity allow rule exists
control-plane MEC services are internal and are not directly exposed to user devices during degraded operation

ISLANDED.reason: authorized responder may access critical services
non-critical services are blocked in island mode
general data network access is blocked in island mode
central identity and policy services are blocked in island mode
unknown nodes cannot access critical services
civilian users cannot access responder critical services
sensor nodes cannot access responder critical services
default deny for critical services unless an explicit local identity allow rule exists
control-plane MEC services are internal and are not directly exposed to user devices in island mode
